"[13] WIT ADVISED SEMI OVERTURNED DUE TO HIGH WINDS- IS NEG 1125 [Shared]"
"[10] [Appended, 09:58:27] [3] RP STOPPED AND TALKED TO SEMI DRIVER // HE ADVS NOT INJURED HEAVY WIND TIPPED IT OVER"
"[9] [Appended, 09:58:27] [2] SEMI TRUCK O/TURN LAYING ON ITS SIDE ON RS"
"[4] THIS WILL BACK UP TRAFFIC ON THE SB 5 AND SB 805 HEADING TOWARDS THE SAN YSIDRO POE "
"[3] STARTING NOW -- THE MX SIDE IS GOING TO CLOSE THE POE FOR 15 MIN EVERY 2 HOURS TIL AN UNK TIME TOMORROW AM "
"[14] 1039 ASTREA1 VIA LAW AIR , CPZ UTL [Shared]"
"[1] [1] NAVY BLU VN PLT UNK // DRIVING EB ON RS // SLOW SPEEDS[Shared]"

Log.Location: "I10 E / County Line Rd Indio Exit 87"

details.IncidentDetail: "[3] 97-R30 #3 LANE SHUT DOWN UNTIL 1500 FROM CAL MESA TO CHERRY VALLEY"

details.IncidentDetail: "[45] [Appended, 10:12:35] [4] NO ONE SEEN IN OR AROUND VEH"
